programs.title: Clean It, Fix It
programs.desc: The team visit Bristol to help a busy household of nine young professionals. Their communal areas are in desperate need of some attention.

programs.title: Big Cats 24/7
programs.desc: A fight with intruders leaves the lion pride males injured and the mothers with cubs vulnerable to attack. Xudum the female leopard takes risks to find a mate.

programs.title: Vintage Antiques Roadshow
programs.desc: Antiques show presented by Michael Aspel. The team visit Royal Holloway College in Surrey, where their finds include a set of rare costume designs.

programs.title: Flog It!
programs.desc: Flog it comes from the Bowes Museum at Barnard castle in County Durham. The museum was purpose built to house the collection of Josephine and John Bowes.

programs.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programs.desc: Jordan Banjo, Sian Lloyd, Nick Pickard and Ellie White test their general knowledge skills on this week's House of Games.

programs.title: Great Korean Railway Journeys
programs.desc: Michael's journey continues in Busan, South Korea's second city.
